scripts.check: node -c server.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('pixess.html','utf-8');let i=h.indexOf('const \$ = (id)');let e=h.lastIndexOf('</script>');new Function(h.substring(i,e));console.log('Main OK')"
scripts.size:all: npm run build && node server.js --size pixess.html && node server.js --size dist/index.html
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist/ --project-name=pixess --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
